name: Scientific Visualization
description: Creates publication-ready scientific figures with multi-panel layouts, statistical annotations, colorblind-safe palettes, and journal-specific formatting (Nature, Science, Cell) using matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly.

evidence.notes: K-Dense-AI scientific-agent-skills — reproducible scientific-visualization skill orchestrating matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly for journal-quality multi-panel figures with PDF/EPS/TIFF/PNG export and accessibility annotations.
